summary: This CSV file contains system prompts and conversation history for an AI voice agent designed for a dental clinic in Chile. The instructions define goal prioritization, safety guardrails regarding medical advice, and specific business details like clinic location and availability. The content is written in Spanish and appears to be a deprecated engineering artifact.
